summary: Iteration 4: Verified DiagnosticsContext/DiagnosticsPanel additions + regression of prior features. All 16 frontend assertions passed (panel mounts on /, /airdrop, /explorer; collapsed by default; expands on toggle; shows 'No events yet' empty state; copy/clear buttons present; close button removes panel from DOM; cost-preview-chip and inline validation still work; network switcher intact; no ErrorBoundary fallback rendered). Backend re-run (35 tests): all endpoints requested in this iteration pass — /api/health 200, /api/airdrop/mint-info/USDC returns decimals/supply, /api/tokens/create valid payload 200, /api/tokens/create with bad payer pubkey returns HTTP 400 with clean field_errors as specified.

minor.issue: Pre-existing test contract drift: 5 validation tests in test_airdrop.py::TestTokenCreateValidation assert status_code==422 but server now returns 400 with structured field_errors (matches problem statement: 'bad payer pubkey -> HTTP 400 with clean field error'). Tests should be updated to accept (400, 422).

Returned 200 in test_supply_zero (Pydantic field has gt=0 so a 400/422 was expected). Worth a quick check by main agent — may indicate the field name in test payload is not the validated field, OR validator was relaxed. The other validation rules (name>64, symbol>13, decimals=10) correctly return 400.

tests_executed.name: Empty state 'No events yet' text shown
error-name visible after empty token-name-input blur
diagnostics-panel removed from DOM after close-button click
diagnostics-panel mounts on /airdrop after fresh nav
No ErrorBoundary 'Something broke' fallback on any route
POST /api/tokens/create bad payer pubkey -> 400 with field_errors

critical_code_review_comments: DiagnosticsContext: clean event bus with 100-event cap and idempotent shift on overflow. useDiagnostics() returns safe no-op fallback when provider missing — defensive and good.
DiagnosticsPanel: respects REACT_APP_DEBUG_TOKEN_CREATE flag (defaults true). hidden state is local — once user closes it, panel remains hidden until page reload. Acceptable for a debug overlay.

DiagnosticsPanel close button is a span with role='button' nested inside the toggle button — works fine because stopPropagation is called, but technically a button-in-button. Minor a11y nit; not blocking.

App.js provider order: ErrorBoundary > NetworkProvider > DiagnosticsProvider > SolanaProvider > BrowserRouter. Sensible — diagnostics is independent of solana/wallet state so it survives wallet errors.

Backend validation now emits a uniform 400 + field_errors envelope instead of 422 — this is a cleaner contract for the frontend but breaks the 5 pytest assertions that hard-code 422. Recommend updating tests OR widening server to also accept 422 in test helpers.
test_supply_zero returning 200 is suspicious — worth checking whether 'total_supply: 0' is being accepted, or the override merge in the test means the field isn't reaching the validator.
action_items: (Optional) Update /app/backend/tests/test_airdrop.py::TestTokenCreateValidation to assert status_code in (400, 422) — backend intentionally returns 400 + field_errors now.
(Investigate) test_supply_zero — confirm total_supply=0 is rejected by the live endpoint, or fix the test payload merge.
No frontend issues; diagnostics panel is live, accessible, and does not interfere with any existing flow.

success_rate.backend: 85.7% (30/35) — 5 failures are pre-existing test contract drift, not regressions from this iteration

context_for_next_testing_agent: DiagnosticsPanel is mounted at App root and visible on every route bottom-right. Key testids: diagnostics-panel, diagnostics-toggle, diagnostics-body (only present when open), diagnostics-close, diagnostics-copy, diagnostics-clear, diag-event-<seq>. Panel hidden state is local (per page load). Backend test_airdrop.py validation tests need a (400,422) tuple — server now returns 400+field_errors uniformly. Wallet-signing flows still cannot be exercised headless (no Phantom), so the 11-stage instrumentation in useTokenOperations.createToken (init/preflight/backend-build/deserialize/size-check/simulate/user-confirm/wallet-sign/send/confirm/verify/audit) cannot be runtime-verified — only the panel UI plumbing and the structural integrity of the React tree were validated.
rca of the issue: No new bugs introduced by iteration 4. The 5 backend test failures pre-date this iteration: backend converts Pydantic 422 to a uniform 400 envelope with field_errors (matches the spec). Suggested mitigation: relax test assertions to `assert r.status_code in (400, 422)`.
